title: BEM-876 response findings
objective:
Append to governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM876_PROTOCOL_V14_RESPONSE.md: 
Findings:
- v1.4 is approved as continuity correction: preserve v1.2 high-level architecture and add v1.3/v1.4 details below it.
- Director and Worker are role-objects. Curator is an internal component inside General Director, Director, and Worker role-objects.
- General Director is added above Directors for rules that apply to Directors.
- Use управляющий контур instead of управляющая плоскость.
- Use журнал событий instead of реестр времени.
- Use рабочая область as the unified term for development, testing, integration, and main verified areas.
No issue comments.
